name: tisax
description: TISAX (Trusted Information Security Assessment Exchange) compliance advisor for automotive suppliers — label selection (Info/Info High/Prototype/Strict Prototype/Data), VDA ISA 6.0 gap analysis across all 16 chapters, assessment level guidance (AL1/AL2/AL3), ENX portal registration, Audit Provider engagement, maturity model assessment, and prototype protection controls for the automotive supply chain.
